    "Arc-flash rating of selected PPE is below the required task category specified on the equipment label",
    "Discrepancy between documentation/ID and actual clothing protection level"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately before any energized electrical contact or boundary entry occurs",
    "Replace the inadequate PPE with gear that meets or exceeds the labeled NFPA 70E arc-flash category",
    "Verify the documentation and ID tags of the replacement PPE against the equipment label"

  "rationale": "The selected PPE does not meet the minimum arc-flash protection boundary requirements specified by the equipment label and NFPA 70E. Operating with an arc-flash rating below the task category poses an immediate, critical risk of severe burn injury or death in the event of an arc flash.",

    "OSHA 1910 Subpart I (Personal Protective Equipment)"
